hypothesis: F-EVAL1 SUFFICIENT (2.25/3) is STILL inflated because the SUFFICIENT threshold itself was never externally validated. Prediction: >=2 of 4 goal scores use circular definitions.
method: Audit each goal scorer in eval_sufficiency_scores.py. Count metrics that reference only internal swarm artifacts vs. external sources. Check whether L-1191 grounding correction is bypassed by false instruments.
expect: >=2 of 4 goals use circular definitions. Composite is at most 0.25 inflated.
actual: 4/4 goals use entirely self-referential metrics (12/12 metrics internal). L-1204 diagnosed Truthful's false instrument (signal_density as external_grounding) but fix was NOT applied in code. Truthful still passed external_grounding=True via self-referential signal_density>=0.1. Fix applied: external_grounding_ok now requires >5% external trail in recent lessons. Composite dropped 2.25/3 -> 2.0/3. Adversarial hypothesis PARTIALLY CONFIRMED: magnitude worse than predicted (4/4 not 2/4), but direction correct.
diff: Predicted >=2/4 circular: actual 4/4 (underestimated self-referentiality). Novel finding: L-1204 diagnosed false instrument but no code fix followed — diagnosis-without-repair is a failure mode (L-601 enforcement gap). The 12/12 self-referential count was not documented at this granularity.
